---
title: "Project 4 - Final Report Work"
author: "Madelynn Schina"
date: "May 2026"
output: pdf_document
---


```{r, include=F} 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(knitr)

```




Notes from Class & Presentations
- "exchangable" correlation; 0, 0.35, 0.7
- 10,000 iterations, not 1,000
- Will likely need to run it in parallel due to computation time
- Look into p-value, Carter argued against using 0.157 so 0.05 might be the better choice
